name: OperationDescriptorAndEnvelope
description: Authoritative provider-neutral operation registry, common envelopes, wire primitives, exit categories, and stable cross-operation errors.
schema_def: operation_descriptor: operationId, cliPath, supported contractVersion range, query or mutation kind, concrete source-generated request/result types, complete stable errors, help examples, explicit handler factory. request_envelope: contractVersion, actor kind and safe label with optional runId, typed input, mutation idempotency key outside JSON input. result_envelope: contractVersion, operationId, outcome and success result or error code, category, safe message, optional field codes. Wire: Money canonical decimal string with ZAR, LocalDate yyyy-MM-dd, opaque ULIDs, closed enums. Exits: 0 success; 2 usage or schema; 3 validation; 4 not found; 5 conflict or busy; 6 lifecycle or transition; 7 incompatibility; 8 integrity, ambiguity, review, backup, candidate, or activation; 9 host; 10 sanitized internal. Unknown fields rejected. Public schema and diagnostics prohibit database internals, paths, SQL, exception text, arbitrary metadata, raw source payloads, AgentMail, MIME, mailbox, sender, recipient, WhatsApp, delivery, retry, credentials, and unmasked identifiers. Registry solely generates help, schema, dispatch, conformance tests, and optional guidance manifests.
